  1. Unnamed Package
Contents
  1. Description
  2. Classes and Interfaces

Unnamed Package

  • Class
    Description
    Command
    The three actions the player can ask the robot to perform.
    CommandResult
    Holds the outcome of executing one game command (move or turn).
    Direction
    The four compass directions the robot can face.
    GameSetup
    Holds everything needed to start one new game: the grid, the robot, and the briefing message.
    Grid
    Represents the game board: size, obstacle (rock) positions, and goal cell.
    Position
    Represents a single cell on the game grid by its row and column indices.
    RandomLevelFactory
    Creates a new random puzzle (grid, robot, briefing) each time the game starts or the player presses R.
    Robot
    Represents the robot's state: where it is, which way it faces, and how many moves it has made.
    RobotController
    The game rule engine: decides whether moves are legal and executes commands.
    RobotGame
    The user-interface layer for the Robot Rescue Mission game.
